key_points: Minerals are naturally occurring substances with a definite chemical composition
Minerals are unevenly distributed across the Earth's crust
Iron ore is the basic mineral used in the steel industry
Coal, petroleum and natural gas are major fossil fuels
Renewable energy sources include solar, wind and tidal energy
examples: Iron ore used for steel production
Coal used in thermal power plants
Solar panels used to generate electricity
Windmills used to produce wind energy
formulas: Energy conservation = Efficient use of available energy resources
Renewable energy = Energy that can be replenished naturally
exam_tips: Remember the major iron ore belts in India
Understand the difference between renewable and non-renewable energy
Learn examples of ferrous and non-ferrous minerals
Study important coalfields and petroleum regions
